name: Kubernetes Deployment

name: Docker Optimization

name: Terraform Modules

name: CI/CD Pipeline

prompt:

4. 部署发布
5. 回滚策略

支持GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/Jenkins

name: Monitoring & Alerting

name: Chaos Engineering

name: Cost Optimization

1. 资源使用分析
2. 实例类型优化

遵循FinOps最佳实践
